title: Sensei Curriculum Goal
description: Per-goal state file (learner/goals/<slug>.yaml). Defines a curriculum DAG with node states and prerequisites. At most one node may be active at any time (cross-field constraint, not enforceable by JSON Schema alone).

schema_version.description: Goal schema version. Bump on any field-semantics change.

goal_id.description: URL-safe slug identifying this goal. Immutable once set.

expressed_as.description: Learner's original goal statement in natural language.

created.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of goal creation.

nodes.description: Map from topic slug to NodeState. Represents the curriculum DAG.

priority.description: Learner-expressed goal priority for cross-goal scheduling

paused_at.description: ISO timestamp when goal was paused (null if never paused)

resumed_at.description: ISO timestamp when goal was last resumed (null if never resumed)

deadline.description: Optional ISO-8601 UTC deadline for this goal. Used by priority scoring for urgency.

prerequisites.description: List of prerequisite topic slugs (must reference existing nodes).

spawned_from.description: Parent topic slug if this node was a gap-fill spawn, else null.

require_redemonstration.description: When true, the node requires in-context mastery proof even if the topic is globally known.

concept_tags.description: Abstract concept tags identifying transferable knowledge independent of goal-specific framing.

PerformanceTraining.description: Performance phase state. Tracks whether the goal is in performance training and the current stage.

active.description: Whether the performance training phase is currently active for this goal.

stage.description: Current stage in the Performance Preparation Stack (1-6).

entered_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the performance phase was activated.

event_type.description: The type of performance event the learner is preparing for.

event_date.description: ISO-8601 UTC target date for the performance event.
